Find the Right Tool
for Your Business
Hero.subtitleBold: Honest reviews. Real comparisons. No guesswork.
Hero.subtitleRest: We test every website builder, hosting service, and online tool so you don't have to. Get expert recommendations tailored for the Middle East market.

analysisCard.label: ANALYZING TOOLS
analysisCard.aiBubble1: I found 5 CRM tools with Arabic support and MENA-region pricing.
analysisCard.userBubble1: Which one fits a startup in Saudi?
analysisCard.aiBubble2: Based on pricing & features, here are your top 3 picks.
analysisCard.summaryText: Analyzed 5 CRM tools for Saudi startups. Ranked by Arabic support, local payment integration, and MENA pricing.

NextPlatform.title: Everything to Win Every Customer Conversation
NextPlatform.stat1Desc: Handled by our network every year

ci.title: Customer Interactions
ci.description: Connect with customers across every channel from a single platform. Voice, video, chat, email, and social, all in one place.
ci.link1Desc: Business calls and texts from any device.
ci.link2Desc: Video calls with screen sharing and recording.
ci.link4Desc: One inbox for all customer emails.
ci.link5Desc: Respond to reviews and social messages in one place.
ci.link7Desc: Real-time chat with channels and threads.

card1.label: Any Size Business
card1.title: Scale Without Limits
card1.desc: Built for businesses of any size, from startup to enterprise. Grow your communications without growing complexity.

card2.label: Unified Visibility
card2.title: One View for Everyone
card2.desc: From frontline employees to the CEO, everyone sees the same actionable, real-time customer insights. That's true unification.

EndOfBusywork.label: Why Trust Us
EndOfBusywork.headline: Reviews You Can Actually Trust.
EndOfBusywork.tagline: Independent testing. No sponsored content. Ever.
EndOfBusywork.desc: We buy every tool with our own money, test it for weeks, and publish honest results. No affiliate pressure, no paid placements — just real reviews from real testing, built for the Middle East market.

MoreImpact.headline:
Less Busywork.
More Impact.
MoreImpact.subhead: XBert handles the routine stuff like customer questions, scheduling, and follow-ups. So your team has more time for the work that actually moves your business forward.

card1.title: We buy and test every tool ourselves.
card1.desc: No vendor demos or press kits. We sign up, pay, and use each tool for weeks — just like you would. Real testing, real results.

card2.title: No sponsored reviews. No affiliate bias.
card2.desc: Our recommendations are based on testing, not payments. We disclose all affiliate links transparently. Your trust is our priority.

card3.title: Built for the Middle East market.
card3.desc: Payment gateways, RTL support, local hosting, Arabic language tools — we test what matters for businesses in the MENA region.

card1.text: "An incredible 98% improvement in customer response time and an 11% increase in positive reviews."
card1.name: Hyundai

card2.text: "With all social channels unified into one inbox, we reduced response times to under 2 hours across LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram."
card2.name: DHL

card3.text: "Our bakery owners are busy and don't have time for complicated systems. The interface and the Nextiva Support team were a big selling point."
card3.name: Vinny Torregrossa

card4.text: "Since adopting Nextiva, we've achieved 30% annual revenue growth. We now provide cloud communications to 325 employees across six locations with 99.999% uptime."
card4.name: Franklin Street

card5.text: "Nextiva's VoIP phone system has helped us realize an estimated 60% cost savings over our previous system, and our customers never receive a busy signal."
card5.name: Tabarka Studio

card6.text: "We were due for a complete overhaul. Moving to Nextiva gave us an all-in-one cloud-based solution that was easier to manage, more reliable, and cut our communications costs by more than 50%."
card6.name: Rich Sparkman

card1.title: Honest, in-depth reviews.
card1.desc: We spend weeks testing each tool — from setup to daily use. Our reviews cover pricing, features, ease of use, and support quality with real screenshots.

card2.title: Side-by-side comparisons.
card2.desc: Not sure which tool to pick? Our comparison tables break down features, pricing, and performance so you can see exactly what fits your needs.

card3.title: Expert tested, reader trusted.
card3.desc: Our editorial team has tested over 150 tools. We combine expert analysis with real user feedback to deliver recommendations you can count on.

card1.desc: Transformed customer communications and dramatically improved team productivity.

card2.desc: Improved answer ratios by 20% with Nextiva Contact Center for better patient care.

card3.desc: High-volume call center boosted voice channel efficiency by 154% with Nextiva.

card4.desc: 325 employees across six locations communicate seamlessly with 99.999% uptime.

card5.desc: Recruit and educate more students on budget with unified communications.

card6.desc: Reduced communication costs by 60% while customers never receive a busy signal.

card7.desc: The iconic brand relies on rock-solid operations, cutting costs in half.

card8.desc: 365-day fan engagement with exceptional season ticket member experiences.

card9.desc: 1M+ messages per month with AI-powered bots on WhatsApp.

card10.desc: Dependable communications serving at-risk citizens every day of the year.

Pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
Pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes business phone and team messaging. Add AI when you're ready. Pick the one that fits how your team works.
Pricing.footerNote: All plans include 24/7 customer support • No credit card required for demo • Cancel anytime

core.name: Core
core.description: Reliably run your business with unified voice, video, SMS, and digital channels with instant setup.

engage.name: Engage
engage.description: Equip your teams with automation, advanced tools, and intelligent routing for personalized experiences at scale.

powerSuite.name: Power Suite CX
powerSuite.description: Blended inbound/outbound calls, AI call summaries, and chatbots, all in one place.

essential.name: Essential
essential.description: Empower your team to deliver exceptional support across voice and web chat with built-in journey orchestration, smart automations, and intelligent routing.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Built on everything in Essential with support for more channels, dynamic scripting, intelligent routing, and self-service powered by easy-to-build workflows.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Unlock unlimited channels, limitless intelligent routing, and secure in-conversation payments. Everything your team needs for fast, secure, and seamless experiences at scale.

card1.label: Award-Winning
card1.title: AI-Powered Contact Center
card1.desc: Handle inbound and outbound customer interactions across voice, chat, email, and SMS with intelligent routing and real-time analytics.

card2.label: Award-Winning
card2.title: AI-Powered Business Phone
card2.desc: Reliable business phone service with unlimited calling, video meetings, and team messaging on any device. Set up in minutes, not weeks.

notion.name: Notion — The All-in-One Workspace
notion.desc: Notion combines notes, docs, databases, and project boards in a single tool. Perfect for MENA teams who want to replace multiple apps with one flexible platform.
notion.pro1: Incredibly flexible — adapts to any workflow
notion.pro2: Great Arabic text support and RTL layout
notion.pro3: Generous free tier for small teams

zoom.name: Zoom — Connect Teams Across the Region
zoom.desc: Zoom remains the go-to video platform for MENA businesses. Reliable calls, Arabic interface support, and deep integrations make it a daily essential.
zoom.pro2: Arabic UI and regional data centers
zoom.con2: AI features still catching up to rivals

hubspot.name: HubSpot — CRM Built for Growth
hubspot.desc: HubSpot gives growing MENA businesses a powerful CRM with marketing, sales, and service tools in one platform. No coding required.
hubspot.pro2: Powerful free CRM with no expiry
hubspot.con2: Limited Arabic localization in some modules

canva.name: Canva — Design Without Designers
canva.desc: Canva empowers anyone to create stunning visuals. With Arabic templates, RTL support, and an AI-powered toolkit, it's a must-have for MENA content teams.
canva.con2: Export quality can vary on free plan
